/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/test_string_helper.dir/test_string_helper_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_string_helper.dir/test_string_helper.cpp.o -o test_string_helper  libtest_core.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libqscintilla2_qt6.so
